name: Jalapenos Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the jalapeno peppers.
2. Slit lengthwise on one side of each pepper; remove seeds and veins, leaving stems attached.
3. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Beat in the shredded Cheddar cheese and sliced green onions.
5. Stuff each pepper with part of the cheese mixture.
6. Arrange the stuffed peppers on a heatproof serving plate or baking sheet.
7. Bake in a 350 degree oven for about 10 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
8. Top each pepper with a pimiento strip.
Makes 12
